name: Frozen Fruit Swirl
recipeInstructions:
1. Place frozen banana pieces in a food processor.
2. Pulse with on and off motions until finely chopped; whirl until pureed.
3. Spoon puree into a bowl and place in the freezer.
4. Add berries to the food processor.
5. Whirl until pureed.
6. Remove bananas from the freezer.
7. Swirl in berry puree.
8. Serve at once.
Makes 6 servings.
Approximate nutritional analysis: 83 calories per 1/2-cup serving; 1g protein; 21g carbohydrate; 4g fat (4% of calories); 2g fiber; 1.5mg sodium; 37% of the Daily Value for vitamin C; 22% for vitamin B6.
Source: Pritikin Longevity Center, Head Teacher Susan Massaron, in AMERICAN HEALTH magazine, November 1995, pg. 63.
